---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for AnswerReady AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the workflow or gap in the current plugin.

## Suggested solution

What would you like AnswerReady AI to do? Be as specific as you can (sidebar, settings, AI Review, checklists, etc.).

## User type

Which best describes you? (check one or more)

- [ ] Editor
- [ ] Journalist
- [ ] SEO
- [ ] Publisher
- [ ] Developer
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Why this would help

How would this improve publishing readiness, editorial quality, or your WordPress workflow?

## Possible alternatives

Have you considered workarounds or other tools? What would be “good enough” if this feature is not built?

## Additional context

- Related issues or discussions (links)
- Screenshots or mockups (optional)
- Whether you need **rule-based checks only**, **AI Review**, or both
